title: The Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Development Act, 2006
full_text: The Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Development Act, 2006 सूक्ष्‍म, लघु और मध्‍यम उद्यम विकासअधिनियम, 2006 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200627 Act Number: 27 Enactment Date: 2006-06-16 Act Year: 2006 Short Title: The Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Development Act, 2006 Hindi Title: सूक्ष्‍म, लघु और मध्‍यम उद्यम विकासअधिनियम, 2006 Long Title: An Act to provide for facilitating the promotion and development and enhancing the competitiveness of micro, small and medium enterprises and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Enforcement Date: 02-10-2006 Notification: 2nd October, 2006, vide notification No. S.O. 1154(E) dated 18th July, 2006, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary Part II sec.3(ii). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Development Act, 2006 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II NATIONAL BOARD FOR MICRO, SMALL AND MEDIUM ENTERPRISES CHAPTER III CLASSIFICATION OF ENTERPRISES, ADVISORY COMMITTEE AND MEMORANDUM OF MICRO, SMALL AND MEDIUM ENTERPRISES CHAPTER IV MEASURES FOR PROMOTION, DEVELOPMENT AND ENHANCEMENT OF COMPETITIVENESS OF MICRO, SMALL AND MEDIUM ENTERPRISES CHAPTER V DELAYED PAYMENTS TO MICRO AND SMALL ENTERPRISES CHAPTER VI MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Establishment of Board. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Removal of member from Board. Section 5. Functions of Board. Section 6. Powers and functions of Member-Secretary of Board. Show Related Subordinates Section 7. Classification of enterprises. Show Related Subordinates Section 8. Memorandum of micro, small and medium enterprises. Show Related Subordinates Section 9. Measures for promotion and development. Show Related Subordinates Section 10. Credit facilities. Section 11. Procurement preference policy. Show Related Subordinates Section 12. Funds. Show Related Subordinates Section 13. Grants by Central Government. Section 14. Administration and utilisation of Fund or Funds. Section 15. Liability of buyer to make payment. Section 16. Date from which and rate at which interest is payable. Section 17. Recovery of amount due. Section 18. Reference to Micro and small Enterprises Facilitation Council. Section 19. Application for setting aside decree, award or order. Section 20. Establishment of Micro and Small Enterprises Facilitation Council. Section 21. Composition of Micro and Small Enterprises Facilitation Council. Section 22. Requirement to specify unpaid amount with interest in the annual statement of accounts. Section 23. Interest not to be allowed as deduction from income. Section 24. Overriding effect. Section 25. Scheme for closure of business of micro, small and medium enterprises. Section 26. Appointment of Officers and other employees. Section 27. Penalty for contravention of section 8 or section 22 or section 26. Section 28. Jurisdiction of courts. Section 29. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 30. Power to make rules by State Government. Section 31. Power to remove difficulties. Section 32. Repeal of Act 32 of 1993. 02-02-2021 S.O. 498(E) —In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (3) of section 3 of the Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Development Act, 2006 (27 of 2006), read with rule 3 of the
